summary: Iteration 39 - Pagination and Autocomplete features. Backend: 16/16 tests PASS (100%). Frontend: All UI tests PASS. GET /api/providers returns {results, total, skip, limit} format correctly. GET /api/providers/comunas returns sorted array of 34 distinct comunas. Pagination controls work (Anterior/Siguiente buttons, page numbers). Comuna autocomplete shows suggestions while typing and filters results on selection. Service filter tabs (Residencias, Cuidado a Domicilio, Salud Mental) work correctly.

issues: Google Maps intentionally disabled - shows 'Mapa no disponible' placeholder which is acceptable

backend_api_tests: GET /api/providers returns {results, total, skip, limit} format
GET /api/providers default pagination is skip=0, limit=50
GET /api/providers/comunas returns array of distinct comunas
GET /api/providers combined service_type and comuna filter works
frontend_ui_tests: Search page shows total count '229 Servicios encontrados'
Search page shows pagination info 'Página 1 de 12'
Pagination controls visible with 7 page number buttons
Anterior and Siguiente buttons visible and functional
Clicking Anterior goes back one page
Comuna autocomplete shows dropdown on typing 'Las'
Search filters results (17 for Las Condes)
Cuidado a Domicilio tab filters to 1 result
Salud Mental tab filters to 0 results
Provider cards display correctly with 20 per page

critical_code_review_comments: Backend pagination response format {results, total, skip, limit} correctly implemented
Frontend handles both old array format and new object format for backwards compatibility
Comuna autocomplete properly fetches from /api/providers/comunas endpoint
PAGE_SIZE = 20 correctly used for frontend pagination
All data-testid attributes properly implemented for testing
Note: Google Maps disabled (API key requires billing) - acceptable fallback UI shown
seed_data_creation: None - used existing 229 providers in database
context_for_next_testing_agent: Iteration 39: Pagination and Autocomplete COMPLETE. Backend returns {results, total, skip, limit} for GET /api/providers. New endpoint GET /api/providers/comunas returns 34 distinct comunas. Frontend search page at /search has pagination controls (Anterior/Siguiente + page numbers), PAGE_SIZE=20. Autocomplete shows comuna suggestions while typing. All service filter tabs work. 229 total providers in DB. Google Maps intentionally disabled.

mocked_apis.notes: Google Maps API intentionally disabled (requires billing account) - placeholder shown
